slides.title: AdugboInsure
slides.body: Transforming Communities with Affordable Health Insurance

slides.title: The Problem
bullets: Millions of Nigerians still pay for healthcare out of pocket.
Health insurance adoption remains low, especially in underserved communities.
Low awareness, low trust, and irregular income reduce uptake.
Communities around PHCs need affordable and accessible coverage options.

slides.title: Our Solution
slides.body: AdugboInsure distributes community health insurance through trusted local POS agents, using a simple e-form, flexible payment support, and community-based distribution channels.

slides.title: Target Customer
bullets: Low-income households in rural and underserved urban communities.
Farmers, traders, merchants, artisans, and small business owners.
People living or working around primary health centres.

slides.title: Prototype and Traction
slides.body: Pre-revenue pilot-stage venture with a defined e-form workflow, an active 13-agent distribution network, and community rollout assets already in use.

slides.title: Customers and Revenue
bullets: Current stage: pre-revenue pilot / distribution setup

slides.title: Team
bullets: Dr. Ajidahun Olusina — Partner, Health Sector Advisor
